pages.title: Kamen Rider Zeztz Exdream
pages.text: Appears in:$(li)Kamen Rider Zeztz (2025, TV show)$(br2)Transforms with the $(l:zeztz/devices/zeztz_exdream_driver)Zeztz Exdream Driver$(/l)$(br2)Status Effects:$(li)Speed V$(li)Punch VI$(li)Strength IX (with empty hand)$(li)Strength IV (with weapon)$(li)Haste III$(li)Resistance IV$(li)Night Vision$(li)Boost III$(li)Jump Boost IV
